highlights.description: Unified Go library for AI image generation with OpenAI and Fal AI providers
Comprehensive MkDocs documentation site with API reference and guides

added.description: `APIError` type with status code, error code, message, and provider name
Model constants for OpenAI (GPT Image 2, GPT Image 1, DALL-E 3, DALL-E 2) and Fal AI (FLUX Pro/Dev/Schnell, SDXL)
`GetModelInfo()` function returning model metadata (provider, max images, HD support, edit support)
OpenAI provider with image generation, editing (DALL-E 2), and variations (DALL-E 2)
Fal AI provider with image generation and upscaling via Clarity Upscaler
Negative prompts, seeds, inference steps, and guidance scale for Fal AI
Custom image dimensions via `ProviderOptions` for Fal AI
`Client` with automatic provider instantiation and capability checks
`NewProvider()` factory function with environment variable fallback for API keys
`GetCapabilities()` function for static provider capability lookup

tests.description: Unit tests for client initialization and provider factory
Unit tests for OpenAI and Fal AI providers
Tests for model info and capability lookups

documentation.description: README with installation, quick start, and provider comparison
Getting started guide with setup and basic usage
Provider documentation for OpenAI and Fal AI
API reference for client, types, and provider interfaces
Best practices guide for prompts, performance, and security
Error handling guide with retry patterns
Image sizes reference with provider support matrix
